scripts.typecheck: pnpm build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && pnpm typecheck:scripts
scripts.pack:publish: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-mcp pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-server pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-cli pack --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-core publish && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-mcp publish && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-server publish && pnpm --filter @xenonbyte/forma-cli publish
